examples: It is this third city that accounts for New York's high-strung disposition, its poetical deportment, its dedication to the arts, and its incomparable achievements.
If you have the time, go for deportment classes.
You will garner some basic deportment that others pick up on.
Following Burch for a day provides an almost maddening lesson in maintaining the perfect deportment while balancing late-night fittings, lost homework and an endless stream of meetings.
